headline: Microsoft’s OCI, Security, And Healthcare AI Moves Versus Current Valuation
summary: Microsoft co founded the Optical Compute Interconnect (OCI) MSA consortium with AMD, Broadcom, Meta, NVIDIA, and OpenAI to set open standards for large scale optical links in AI data centers. The company expanded its security reach through new Azure focused partnerships with Upwind and DataBahn targeting real time protection, detection, and cost efficiency. Microsoft is working with HABS on Neuro AI and integrating Copilot Health with HealthEx, extending its human centric AI work in...

content.summary: Microsoft co founded the Optical Compute Interconnect (OCI) MSA consortium with AMD, Broadcom, Meta, NVIDIA, and OpenAI to set open standards for large scale optical links in AI data centers. The company expanded its security reach through new Azure focused partnerships with Upwind and DataBahn targeting real time protection, detection, and cost efficiency. Microsoft is working with HABS on Neuro AI and integrating Copilot Health with HealthEx, extending its human centric AI work in...

(TSX: CLS) (NYSE: CLS), a global leader in data center infrastructure and advanced technology solutions, and AMD (NASDAQ: AMD), a leader in high-performance and AI computing, today announced a strategic collaboration to bring the new “Helios” rack-scale AI platform to market. headline: Meta to Spend Up to $27 Billion on Nebius AI Infrastructure
summary: Nebius, a so-called neocloud that operates data centers and has a strategic partnership with Nvidia Corp., will provide Meta $12 billion of dedicated capacity starting in early 2027, the Dutch company said in a statement Monday.  Meta also committed to buying as much as $15 billion in additional capacity that the cloud provider is building for third-party customers.

content.title: Meta to Spend Up to $27 Billion on Nebius AI Infrastructure
content.summary: Nebius, a so-called neocloud that operates data centers and has a strategic partnership with Nvidia Corp., will provide Meta $12 billion of dedicated capacity starting in early 2027, the Dutch company said in a statement Monday.  Meta also committed to buying as much as $15 billion in additional capacity that the cloud provider is building for third-party customers.

headline: Broadcom Expands AI Data Center Role With New Hardware And Standards
summary: Broadcom (NasdaqGS:AVGO) has introduced its Taurus 400G/lane optical DSP and Tomahawk 6 AI switch family, expanding its AI data center hardware lineup. The company is helping launch the Optical Compute Interconnect open standard with partners including AMD, Meta, Microsoft, Nvidia, and OpenAI. These developments aim to support higher bandwidth connectivity, power efficiency, and multi vendor interoperability for hyperscale AI data centers. Broadcom is already a key name in AI...

headline: MiTAC Accelerates Next-Gen AI with Turnkey Solutions and Flexible NVIDIA MGX at NVIDIA GTC 2026
